title: HIGH: DataTable pagination uses hardcoded shadow strings instead of utility
description:
H7: src/components/ui/data-table.tsx lines 136, 148-149:
```tsx
'shadow-emboss-out-light-sm dark:shadow-emboss-out-dark-sm'
```
Uses literal shadow classes instead of `getEmbossShadow('out', 'small')`. Every other component uses the utility function. This is an inconsistent hardcoded duplicate that won't update if shadow tokens change.
resolution: Replaced hardcoded shadow strings with getEmbossShadow('out', 'small') utility call
